text:
{
  "type": "DRAG_FILL",
  "data": {
    "challenges": [
      {
        "instruction": "Fill in the blanks using the clues from the Introduction to Khayan Township in Practice Essentials. Refer to the overview and cultural significance of Khayan Township.",
        "codeTemplate": "Khayan Township is located in the _____ Region of Myanmar and is celebrated for its rich _____ heritage.",
        "options": [
          "Yangon",
          "Mandalay",
          "Naypyidaw",
          "Bago",
          "cultural",
          "economic",
          "political",
          "historical"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "Yangon,cultural",
        "explanation": "Khayan Township is located in the Yangon Region of Myanmar and is known for its rich cultural heritage."
      },
      {
        "instruction": "Use the provided context to fill in the blanks about the cultural significance of Khayan Township.",
        "codeTemplate": "The township features diverse _____ and is known for its vibrant _____ community.",
        "options": [
          "cultures",
          "economies",
          "politics",
          "landscapes",
          "artistic",
          "educational",
          "business",
          "social"
        ],
        "correctAnswer": "cultures,vibrant",
        "explanation": "Khayan Township features diverse cultures and is known for its vibrant community."
      }
    ]
  }
}
